hero.name: Shivank Singh
hero.title: Building clean digital products with frontend polish and backend structure
hero.summary: This portfolio is set up so you can easily update your intro, projects, experience, and contact details from one place. It uses a React frontend and a Node/Express backend so you have a strong base for future development.
hero.focusTitle: Open for better Colloboration on BlockChain
hero.focusSummary: Use this area to describe what you are currently learning, building, or looking for in your next role.

about.heading: Designed to stay editable as your work evolves
about.description: Instead of hardcoding everything into many components, this project keeps your portfolio content in a single JSON file served by the backend. That means you can quickly update text, add projects, change links, and expand sections without rewriting the whole UI.

experience.description: I am currently working as a Blockchain Developer, specializing in building enterprise-grade solutions using Hyperledger Fabric. My role focuses on designing secure, scalable, and permissioned blockchain networks for real-world business applications.
descriptions: 🔗 Blockchain Architecture Design robust and scalable network architectures tailored to enterprise needs
📜 Smart Contracts Develop chaincode using Go/Node.js to automate and secure business logic
🔐 Identity & Security Implement secure identity management with Fabric CA and access control policies
🌐 DApp Development Build decentralized applications for seamless interaction with blockchain systems
🔌 System Integration Connect blockchain networks with backend systems using APIs and SDKs
⚙️ Network Optimization Monitor, troubleshoot, and enhance performance for production-grade systems

experience.description: Use this second entry for internships, freelance work, student projects, or personal product development.
descriptions: Built backend APIs and connected them with frontend interfaces for smoother product workflows
Planned project structure so features stayed modular and easier to maintain over time
Handled bug fixes, feature delivery, and iteration based on changing project needs

projects.title: Land Record Management System
projects.description: Land Record Management System is based on private blockchain Hyperledger Fabric Network. It is designed to provide a secure and transaparent platform for managing land records, ensuring data integrity and accessibiltiy to satkeholders. All land transactions and ownershinp details are stored on blockchain, provinding immutable and tamper proof ledger.
details: Created a React frontend that renders content dynamically from the backend portfolio JSON
Built an Express API layer so profile content can be updated from one editable source
Designed the UI to stay responsive across desktop and mobile layouts

projects.title: Decentralised Exchange
projects.description: Created a decentralized exchange (DEX) using React for frontend and Solidity for smart contract development on polygon testnet. For backend I have used Node.js to handle request bind with price feed and user authentications
details: 🌐 Developed a full-stack Decentralized Exchange (DEX) using React for a responsive and interactive frontend interface
⛓️ Designed and deployed smart contracts using Solidity on the Polygon Testnet for secure and efficient token swaps
🖥️ Built backend services using Node.js to handle API requests, user authentication, and blockchain interaction
📊 Integrated real-time price feeds to enable accurate token valuation during trading operations
🔗 Connected frontend with smart contracts using Web3 libraries for seamless wallet interaction and transaction execution
🔐 Structured the project with modular architecture to ensure scalability and maintainability Implemented secure authentication and request handling to enhance user trust and system reliability
⚡ Continuously improved the platform by fixing bugs, optimizing performance, and iterating on features based on testing and feedback
